title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 28 - 2017: Colorado Hot Springs in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief vlog on March 1st, 2017, reflecting on forgetting February only has 28 days. He discusses staying up late working on his website — fixing image sizing issues on his aliens page and reducing picture dimensions for better layout. He also shows Google Earth footage of Colorado hot springs and muses about future vlog content featuring his website pages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: there's a magic and beauty when something is perfect, worth the tedious work
plans to show website pages as content once Google Earth material runs out
